full_text:
Liang Yu (Kongru) жўҒеҜ“ (еӯ”е„’)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liang Yu (жўҒеҜ“), styledKongru (еӯ”е„’). Sent to spy on Wei court and ask for permission to attack Guan Yu. Liang Yu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
